### 🧑‍💻 About me

I'm an IT apprentice focused on **infrastructure, networking and automation**. I script my
way out of repetitive work with **PowerShell** and I'm building lower-level skills with **Rust**.

- 🛠️ IT apprentice at **Arco IT GmbH** — systems & infrastructure
- 🎓 Studying at **TBZ Zürich** (modules M122–M431)
- 🌐 Into **networking, sysadmin and home-lab / NAS** setups
- 🦀 Currently learning **Rust** and deepening **PowerShell** automation
- 🇨🇭 Based in Switzerland
